title: Wildlife Corridor Guide-Light Phase Mask
strategies: trivial: strawman single blazed grating dumping the whole beam on the top-weight patch (evaluator baseline) -> ~0.1
greedy: plain Gerchberg-Saxton toward the weighted profile -> claws energy into the corridor and beats the baseline, but leaves the bright patches ahead of profile
strong: weighted / adaptive-additive Gerchberg-Saxton -> feedback-reweights each patch to the prescribed intensity profile, high efficiency AND high fidelity
invalid: emits a flat 1-D phase list instead of the required N-by-N grid -> rejected by the shape gate -> 0
